about.title: ABOUT SCORPIO88
about.subtitle: The world's most trusted premium online casino platform since 2024
about.whoWeAreP1: SCORPIO88 is a premier online gaming platform that delivers world-class casino entertainment to players worldwide. Founded with a vision to create the most transparent, fair, and exciting gaming experience, we combine cutting-edge technology with luxurious design to provide an unparalleled VIP experience.
about.whoWeAreP2: Our platform is licensed and regulated by the Government of Curacao, ensuring the highest standards of security, fairness, and responsible gaming practices. Every game on our platform uses certified Random Number Generators (RNG) to guarantee fair outcomes.
about.secureDesc: 256-bit SSL encryption protects all transactions and personal data
about.licensedDesc: Fully licensed and regulated by the Government of Curacao
about.instantDesc: Lightning-fast deposits and withdrawals with multiple payment methods
about.missionIntro: We believe gaming should be exciting, fair, and accessible to everyone. Our mission is to deliver:
about.fairGamesDesc: Every outcome is verifiable and uses certified RNG technology
about.vipSupportDesc: Our dedicated support team is always available to assist you
about.responsibleGamingDesc: We promote healthy gaming habits and provide tools for self-management
about.premiumExpDesc: Luxury design and seamless gameplay across all devices

terms.title: TERMS & CONDITIONS
terms.generalText: By accessing and using the SCORPIO88 platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. These terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the service. You must be at least 18 years of age (or the legal age for gambling in your jurisdiction) to use this platform.
terms.account1: Each user may only create one account on the platform.
terms.account2: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials.
terms.account3: All information provided must be accurate and up to date.
terms.account4: SCORPIO88 reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
terms.deposit3: Withdrawals are processed within 1-24 hours depending on the payment method.
terms.deposit4: SCORPIO88 may request identity verification before processing withdrawals.
terms.gamingText: All games on the SCORPIO88 platform use certified Random Number Generators (RNG) to ensure fair outcomes. Any attempt to manipulate game results, exploit bugs, or use automated software is strictly prohibited and will result in immediate account termination and forfeiture of balance.
terms.bonus1: All bonuses are subject to wagering requirements before withdrawal.
terms.bonus2: SCORPIO88 reserves the right to modify or cancel promotions at any time.
terms.bonus3: Bonus abuse or multi-account exploitation will result in account suspension.
terms.liabilityText: SCORPIO88 shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of the platform. We are not responsible for any losses incurred during gameplay as gambling involves inherent risk.
terms.questionsContact: For questions about these terms, contact us at support@scorpio88.com

privacyPage.title: PRIVACY POLICY
privacyPage.collectIntro: At SCORPIO88, your privacy is our priority. We collect the following information:
privacyPage.accountDataDesc: Username, email address, and encrypted password.
privacyPage.activityDataDesc: Game history, betting patterns, and session logs.
privacyPage.deviceDataDesc: IP address, browser type, and device information.
privacyPage.protect1: All data is encrypted using industry-standard 256-bit SSL encryption.
privacyPage.protect2: Passwords are hashed using bcrypt and never stored in plain text.
privacyPage.protect3: Regular security audits and penetration testing are conducted.
privacyPage.protect4: Access to personal data is restricted to authorized personnel only.
privacyPage.use1: To provide and maintain our gaming services.
privacyPage.use2: To process your transactions and manage your account.
privacyPage.use3: To detect and prevent fraud or unauthorized access.
privacyPage.use4: To comply with legal and regulatory requirements.
privacyPage.use5: To send important service notifications and promotional offers (opt-out available).
privacyPage.accessDesc: You can request a copy of your personal data at any time.
privacyPage.correctionDesc: You can request corrections to inaccurate data.
privacyPage.deletionDesc: You can request deletion of your account and personal data.
privacyPage.optOutDesc: You can unsubscribe from promotional communications at any time.
privacyPage.retentionText: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. If you request account deletion, all personal data will be permanently removed within 30 days, except where retention is required by law.
privacyPage.contactDpo: For privacy-related inquiries, contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@scorpio88.com

responsible.title: RESPONSIBLE GAMING
responsible.subtitle: Your well-being is our top priority. Play responsibly.
responsible.importantText: Gambling should be treated as entertainment, not as a source of income. Never gamble more than you can afford to lose. If you feel that gambling is negatively affecting your life, please seek help immediately.
responsible.timeLimitsDesc: Set daily, weekly, or monthly time limits on your gaming sessions. Our system will notify you when you approach your limit and automatically log you out when it's reached.
responsible.depositLimitsDesc: Control your spending by setting deposit limits. Once reached, you won't be able to deposit additional funds until the limit period resets. Contact support to adjust your limits.
responsible.selfExclusionDesc: If you need a break from gambling, you can activate self-exclusion for 24 hours, 7 days, 30 days, or permanently. During this period, you will not be able to access your account or place any bets.
responsible.realityCheckDesc: Enable reality check reminders to receive periodic notifications showing your session duration, total bets, wins, and losses to help you stay in control.
responsible.sign1: Spending more money than you can afford to lose
responsible.sign2: Chasing losses by increasing bet amounts
responsible.sign3: Gambling is affecting your relationships or work
responsible.sign4: Feeling anxious or irritable when not gambling
responsible.sign5: Borrowing money or selling possessions to gamble
responsible.sign6: Hiding gambling habits from friends or family
responsible.needHelpText: If you or someone you know is struggling with problem gambling, please reach out to these organizations:
